g.title: cluster_genetics
g.text: ① Genetics · TSC1 (9q34) / TSC2 (16p13.3) · Two-Hit Loss-of-Heterozygosity

g.title: cluster_mtor
g.text: ② mTORC1 Core Signaling · TSC1/2 → Rheb → mTORC1

g.title: cluster_upstream
g.text: ③ Upstream Inputs to TSC1/2 · Energy · Growth Factors · Stress

g.title: cluster_neuro
g.text: ⑤ Neurological · Cortical Tubers · SEGA · Epilepsy · TAND

g.title: cluster_kidney
g.text: ⑥ Kidney · Angiomyolipoma · Cysts · Renal Cell Carcinoma

g.title: cluster_lung
g.text: ⑦ Lung · LAM (TSC-LAM in 30–40% adult females)

g.title: cluster_eve
g.text: ⑪ Everolimus PK · FKBP12-mTORC1 binding · PD

g.title: cluster_sir
g.text: ⑫ Sirolimus PK · TSC adult · FKBP12-mTORC1 ⊣

g.title: EVE_oral
g.text: 4.5 mg/m² QD · titrated to trough 5–15 ng/mL
